rows.text: moonlight spills across the empty station / one suitcase waits for dawn
rows.explanation: Clear poetic features: intentional line break, vivid imagery ('moonlight spills'), personification, and evocative metaphor. Creates mood and narrative tension through compressed language typical of poetry.

rows.text: three sparrows argue / on the wire above rainwater / city morning hymn
rows.explanation: Clear poetic structure with intentional line breaks, vivid imagery (sparrows, wire, rainwater), and figurative language ('city morning hymn'). Demonstrates compression and aesthetic attention characteristic of poetry.
